# Pete Ghiorse

> AI/ML product leader, founder, hands-on builder, and evidence-backed writer.

Canonical name: Pete Ghiorse
Current role: Group Product Manager for AI/ML at Capital One
Location: New York City
Website: https://peterghiorse.com

## What Pete does

Pete builds AI products, tests how they behave with real users and mutable data, and publishes what the failures teach. He combines enterprise AI/ML product leadership, founder-level ownership, hands-on technical fluency, and rigorous communication.

He is also the founder of Honeydew, a multimodal family-coordination agent with voice, text, photo input, and a catalog of 60+ tools. Honeydew is a real product and a production lab for agent behavior, evaluation, and trust.

Before Capital One and Honeydew, Pete co-founded GiveTide, ran it for five years, and sold it in 2022.

## Practice and skills

Pete’s deliberate practice loop is: Build -> Instrument -> Evaluate -> Publish -> Revise.

Current focus areas:

- AI product strategy, roadmaps, governance, and cross-functional leadership
- Agent evaluation and safety, including act/ask/confirm policy and destructive-action guard cases
- Multimodal AI systems spanning voice, text, images, and tool orchestration
- 0-to-1 founder execution, technical prototyping, instrumentation, and distribution
- Evidence-backed writing with methods, limitations, negative results, and corrections

## Content quality

AI assists with research, red-teaming, implementation, and editing. Pete owns the thesis, source selection, evaluation design, factual claims, and final editorial judgment.

Published work keeps methods and limitations beside results, retains visible corrections, and narrows claims when the evidence is thinner than an early draft suggested.
